landing.hero.title: Social media, but for people
landing.hero.subtitle: No ads. No algorithm. No data sales. Just a place to share joy and sorrow with the people who matter. Open source, owned by everyone, for everyone.
landing.why.title: Why Vonk exists
landing.why.intro: The big platforms have stopped being village squares and become shopping streets where you are the mannequin in the window. Vonk is different — no profit motive, no shareholders, no data sales.
landing.pillar1.title: You are not the product
landing.pillar1.body: End-to-end encryption on direct messages. Photo metadata (like GPS) is automatically stripped. IP addresses are deleted after 48 hours. No trackers, no fingerprinting. Full stop.
landing.pillar2.title: 100% open source
landing.pillar2.body: Every line of code is public, under AGPL-3.0. No hidden trackers, no hidden agenda. Every change is visible. Verify it yourself, or have someone you trust verify it.
landing.pillar3.title: Surplus goes to good causes
landing.pillar3.body: Donations cover hosting. Anything left over goes to organisations for world peace and health. The Vonk community votes each year on where it goes. No payout to shareholders — there aren't any.
landing.pillar4.title: Your pace, your feed
landing.pillar4.body: Chronological timeline. No engagement algorithm, no dopamine loops, no 'suggested for you'. And likes? Only the author sees how many people appreciated a post — you decide for yourself whether that should shape your mood.
landing.distributed.title: Distributed, not centralised
landing.distributed.body: Vonk doesn't run on a single server. Your data is encrypted and spread across multiple nodes — like RAID for hard drives. If one fails, the rest keeps going. Anyone can host a node and contribute to the network. DMs are end-to-end encrypted: not even the host can read them.
landing.finances.title: Everything transparent
landing.finances.body: Every euro Vonk receives and spends is shown publicly. Donations, invoices, hosting costs, charity transfers — all live-readable by anyone. Soon at /open.
landing.cta2.title: Ready to try it?
landing.cta2.body: Still in alpha, but you're welcome. You can sign in with Google; Apple and GitHub follow later. You can always export everything or delete your account completely.
login.title: Welcome to Vonk
login.subtitle: Sign in with an account you already have. No passwords to remember, no spam.
login.more_providers: More providers go live as soon as their keys are registered.
onboarding.title: Let's set up your profile
username.label: Username
avatar.title: Show yourself
avatar.help: A photo of your face, or anything really. We strip EXIF metadata (like GPS coordinates) before storing it.
friends.title: Invite your friends!
friends.help: Vonk is more fun with people you know. Invite them by email, find them by their usernames on other platforms, or discover new Vonk users.
home.empty: Your feed is empty for now. Phase 2 is on the way: posting, following, stories.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
error.google_not_configured: Google login is not yet configured on the server.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Vonk is built for people, not for profit. Your privacy is not a feature we bolt on — it is the foundation. This policy explains what we do (and mostly what we don't do) with your data.
privacy.section1_title: No tracking, no analytics, no fingerprinting
privacy.section1_body: Vonk does not use any form of tracking. No analytics scripts, no pixel trackers, no browser fingerprinting. We do not know which pages you visit, how long you stay, or what you click. We simply do not track you.
privacy.section2_body: Vonk is funded by donations, not advertising. There will never be ads on this platform. Your attention is yours.
privacy.section3_body: Direct messages and snaps on Vonk are end-to-end encrypted. That means the server cannot read them — not us, not the node operators, nobody. Only you and the recipient can see the content.
privacy.section4_body: Every photo or image you upload has its EXIF metadata stripped before storage. GPS coordinates, camera model, timestamps — all removed. Your photos never leak where you were.
privacy.section5_body: IP addresses are hashed on arrival and automatically deleted after 48 hours. We keep hashed IPs briefly for abuse prevention, then they are gone.
privacy.section6_body: Vonk uses OAuth-only login (Google, Apple, GitHub). We never store your password because we never ask for one. Your identity is verified by your OAuth provider.
privacy.section7_body: Your data is stored on distributed cluster nodes. End-to-end encrypted data (like DMs) is unreadable by the hosts. Public data (like posts) is stored as you posted it.
privacy.section8_body: Only what you give us: your email address, display name, profile photo, posts, and media. We do not collect anything beyond what you choose to share.
privacy.section9_body: You can export all your data or delete your account at any time from your settings. Upon deletion, your data is removed from all nodes. This is your right under GDPR and we make it easy.
privacy.section10_body: Vonk uses exactly two cookies: vonk_access and vonk_refresh. These are authentication cookies — they keep you logged in. There are no tracking cookies, no third-party cookies, nothing else.
privacy.section11_body: Our entire codebase is open source under AGPL-3.0. Anyone can audit what we do with your data. You do not have to take our word for it — check the code.
privacy.section12_body: Questions about your privacy? Reach out to info@vonk.social.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Vonk. These terms are written in plain language because we believe you should understand what you agree to.
terms.section1_body: You must be at least 16 years old to use Vonk. This is the minimum age under GDPR for consent to data processing.
terms.section2_title: What you can and cannot do
terms.section2_body: Be yourself, be kind. Do not post illegal content, hate speech, harassment, or threats. Do not impersonate others. Do not use Vonk to distribute malware or spam.
terms.section3_body: Your content is yours. By posting on Vonk, you grant us a license to display and distribute it on the platform — that is needed for the service to work. You can delete your content at any time.
terms.section4_body: We can remove content that violates these terms. If your account repeatedly violates the rules, it may be suspended. We try to be fair and transparent about this.
terms.section5_body: Vonk is alpha software. We do our best, but we cannot guarantee 100% uptime. Data loss is unlikely but possible. Export your data regularly if that worries you.
terms.section6_body: Vonk is operated by VZW Vonk, a Belgian non-profit (vzw/asbl). We are not a corporation, we do not have shareholders, and we do not sell data.
terms.section7_body: These terms are governed by Belgian law. Any disputes will be handled by the courts of Belgium.
terms.section8_body: We may update these terms from time to time. When we do, we will notify you via email or an in-app notification. Continued use after notification means you accept the changes.
